findings.description: Section headings 'Introduction', 'Background' lose their underline decoration in HTML
findings.evidence: PDF shows 'Introduction' and 'Background' with underline styling; HTML shows them as bold headings without underlines

findings.description: Section headings 'Results' and 'Summary' lose their underline decoration in HTML
findings.evidence: PDF shows 'Results' and 'Summary' with underline styling; HTML shows them as bold headings without underlines

findings.description: Map and diagram captions are rendered as plain paragraphs rather than proper figure captions, but heading hierarchy for the main sections (Introduction, Background, Results, Summary) is correct and matches the PDF structure.
findings.evidence:
Map 1, Map 2, Map 3, Map 4, Map 5, Diagram 1 captions are all

tags in the HTML, matching the PDF where they are also non-heading labels. No actual hierarchy issue.

findings.description: The Map 1 treatment zone annotations and the Zone 1 property table appear both integrated with the map image context AND as separate standalone text/table below the image, creating a visual duplication. In the PDF, the text annotations '2013 - 2017 Treated Zone 1 & 2 w/ herbicide' and '2018 - 2019 Treated Zone 1 w/ herbicide' and the property table are part of the Map 1 figure layout, but in the HTML they are rendered as separate paragraphs and a standalone table outside the image.
findings.evidence:
PDF page 3: annotations and property table are spatially arranged alongside Map 1 image. HTML: these appear as separate

and elements after the tag, creating content that looks duplicated or detached from its visual context.

findings.description: The Property table in the HTML adds a header column 'Value' which does not appear in the PDF. The PDF table shows the property names in the left column and values in the right column without a 'Value' header.
findings.evidence: PDF page 3 property table has header 'Property' on the left but no explicit header for the right column. HTML adds '<th>Value</th>' as a fabricated column header.
